items.caption: A scene of financial planning and calculation. in the foreground, a calculator displays the number "125,800" on its screen, suggesting a calculation related to a mortgage or loan amount. a pen rests on a notepad, indicating recent or ongoing note-taking. a mortgage loan agreement contract is visible in the background, with text that includes "mortgage loan agreement" and "dollars $". the presence of a hand holding a pen on the contract implies human interaction, likely for signing or reviewing the document. the overall setting suggests a financial context, possibly related to a mortgage or loan application process.
